allow: Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')
Bash(timeout 60 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 2; done')
Bash(timeout 20 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:3000 >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')
